name: Dirge Team 6™
description: Bard PvP rotation. Pre-dirge softens the target (mez → dispel → mana drain), then Dirgin' Time stacks every buff that boosts damage + resists + casting before the Dirge of Carnage lands.
availability_note: Spells in the phases below are the CORE of the rotation — they're the only required pieces. Everything in the Optional Clickies / Optional Potions sections is gear-tier-dependent and ANY of them are fine to skip if you don't have the item. Bring what you have on the truck.

buttons.label: Mez
buttons.notes: Lock the target in place before the burn.

buttons.label: Mana drain
buttons.notes: Cut their casts off at the knees.

buttons.label: Amp
buttons.notes: Amplification — can be SUNG (level-gated) or CLICKED off Voice of the Serpent.

buttons.label: Harmonize
buttons.notes: Shadowsong Cloak clicky. If you don't have the cloak, use Resonance (next slot) instead.

buttons.label: Resonance
buttons.notes: Free alternative to Harmonize — base bard song, no item required.

alternatives: Sing Amplification yourself once you're level-eligible — same effect, no item needed.
clickies.notes: Nice if you have it; skip otherwise.

alternatives: Resonance (base bard song) — same row in the rotation, no item required.
clickies.notes: If you don't have the cloak, drop the Harmonize button and sing Resonance from the bottom row instead.

clickies.item: Singing Short Sword (or any bard instrument you main)
alternatives: Any instrument matching your active song family — Drum / Wind / Stringed / Brass.
clickies.notes: Bring the instrument family that boosts whichever song you lead the burn with.

_potions_note: Quarm-available potion picks not verified yet. If you have a known-good potion in your inventory you want surfaced (HP, mana, cure-X), name it and we'll add it to the template.
